records.ety: [L. inglorious; pref. in- not + gloria glory, fame: cf. F. inglorieux. See Glory.]

defs: Not glorious; not bringing honor or glory; not accompanied with fame, honor, or celebrity; obscure; humble; as, an inglorious life of ease.
quotes: My next desire is, void of care and strife, To lead a soft, secure, inglorious life.
Some mute inglorious Milton here may rest.

defs: Shameful; disgraceful; ignominious; as, inglorious flight, defeat, etc.
quotes: Inglorious shelter in an alien land.
